text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, don't say that! Keep your head high.
You did a great job!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, time for me to give it a shot! Teach, can
I borrow a coin or two from ya?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Shucks, well... I guess I could make it up with a
huge meal for the newbies.
